title: CVE-2000-0350 — CVSS 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0350

CVSS Score: 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-05-17T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

A debugging feature in NetworkICE ICEcap 2.0.23 and earlier is enabled, which allows a remote attacker to bypass the weak authentication and post unencrypted events.

References: http://advice.networkice.com/advice/Support/KB/q000166/, http://www.osvdb.org/312, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/1216
